hero.name: Chirag Malhotra
hero.title: Frontend Developer | React · JavaScript (ES6+) · TypeScript · SASS

summary.title: Summary
summary.content: Frontend Developer with 5.5+ years of experience building customer-facing web applications used by millions of users. Deep expertise in React, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Redux, HTML5, CSS3, and SASS, with hands-on experience migrating legacy jQuery applications to modern React architectures. Comfortable with iterative, A/B-test-driven product development in Agile teams alongside UX, backend, product, and data stakeholders.

items.frontend: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, SASS, LESS, Responsive Design
items.frameworks: React.js, Redux, Next.js, Angular, jQuery, React Router, Webpack, Web APIs
items.testing: Jest, Enzyme, React Testing Library, Cypress (TDD & E2E)
items.collaboration: Git, CI/CD, Azure DevOps, JIRA, Kanban, Agile/Scrum
items.backend: Java (Java 8), MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, REST APIs

highlights: Built 15+ reusable React components across 3 product modules, cutting code duplication ~35%
Drove iterative UI improvements with UX/product in monthly Agile sprints
Integrated Cypress screenshot-comparison testing to catch UI regressions pre-deployment
Managed state/data flow with Redux; resolved complex bugs via React/Redux DevTools
Integrated REST APIs with backend developers
Active in sprint planning, retrospectives, and peer code reviews
Led full migration of a legacy desktop app to a responsive React web app for 500+ enterprise users
Translated UX wireframes into pixel-perfect React + Redux components
Integrated 10+ third-party libraries; liaised across design, QA, and backend teams
Partnered with QA on testing new pages/modules before release
Handled cross-browser quirks and responsive patterns across modern and legacy browsers

schools.institution: HMR Institute of Technology, GGSIPU, New Delhi
